title: erigeron zederbaueri
intro: Erigeron zederbaueri, also known as alpine fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Erigeron zederbaueri can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
